versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   hpe-csi-driver-3-1-0            true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: hpe-csi
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: hpe-csi-driver-3-1-0
      name: hpe-csi-driver
      namespace: hpe-csi
      values: |
        hpe-csi-driver:
          kubeletRootDir: /var/lib/k0s/kubelet
